items.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
items.summary: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.

items.title: Exploding rocket casts doubts over Nasa's Moon plans
items.summary: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket is a setback for the company and for Nasa's Moon plans.

items.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
items.summary: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

items.title: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
items.summary: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire  Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.

items.title: Survival before safety for Delhi's poor as temperatures hit 45C
items.summary: As temperatures peak, Delhi’s informal workers continue working despite growing health risks.

items.title: Italy restores lucky testicles on bull mosaic worn down by tourists
items.summary: The artwork is the centre of a tradition that involves visitors performing three spins on it for good fortune.

items.title: Mother-in-law of Indian bride whose death set off media frenzy arrested
items.summary: Twisha Sharma's death on 12 May has sparked rival claims of murder and suicide and dominated headlines.

items.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

items.title: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
items.summary: A 21-year-old Austrian man is found guilty of planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.

items.title: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.summary: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.

items.title: Portugal breaks hottest May day record as Europe swelters in heatwave
items.summary: French students are taking their exams in baking schools, while red alerts are issued in Italy.

items.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

items.title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.summary: A 31-year-old Swiss man has been arrested, police say, as images from the scene show parts of the station cordoned off.

items.title: Questions over safety as 16 pupils die in another Kenya school fire
items.summary: Several parents were still waiting for news of their children roughly 12 hours after the fire.

items.title: Jill Biden says she thought husband was having a stroke during 2024 debate
items.summary: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.

items.title: Australia charges woman who returned from Syria with joining Islamic State
items.summary: Several groups of women and children who spent years in a Syrian camp have returned in recent months.

items.title: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
items.summary: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.

items.title: Learning from Ukraine war, Hezbollah is now using fibre-optic drones to hit Israel
items.summary: Fibre-optic drones are now Hezbollah's primary weapon against Israel's soldiers and civilians.

items.title: We analysed thousands of Trump's posts - here's what we found
items.summary: The BBC's Ros Atkins and BBC Verify sifted through thousands of the president's posts.

items.title: How my brother went from liberal Hollywood actor to manosphere 'messiah'
items.summary: The sister of Mexican influencer El Temach tells the BBC she does not recognise him any more.

items.title: Is 'out of control' US tipping culture spreading overseas?
items.summary: With US waiting staff getting cross at receiving less than 20%, tips are also on the rise elsewhere.

items.title: Duterte ICC trial to start on 30 November: What you need to know
items.summary: Duterte is facing charges relating to a long and bloody war on drugs in which thousands were killed.

items.title: Paul McCartney on playing guitar with Paul Mescal: 'He knew it better than I did!'
items.summary: The music legend on delivering "memory songs" for his 20th solo album, The Boys of Dungeon Lane - and why he's intrigued by the new Beatles biopics.

items.title: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
items.summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launch pad at Cape Canaveral in Florida on Thursday night.

items.title: Why Fifa is being investigated over World Cup ticket prices
items.summary: New York and New Jersey are looking into the association after fans have reportedly been "misled" over ticket sales and seat locations.

items.title: Watch: Moment 14-year-old wins US national spelling bee
items.summary: A teenager from California has won the 2026 Scripps National Spelling Bee, after days of fierce competition.

items.title: How did this novel about food win a Booker Prize this year?
items.summary: Taiwan Travelogue is the first novel translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the prestigious award.

items.title: In court as Matthew Perry's assistant sentenced
items.summary: BBC's Shaimaa Khalil was in the room as Kenneth Iwamansa, who injected Perry with ketamine, was sentenced to 41 months in prison.
